addons.name: DKIM Verifier
addons.description: Verifies the DKIM-Signature of an e-mail.
addons.fullDescription:
DomainKeys Identified Mail (DKIM) is a method which allows domains to sign e-mails. The add-on verifies these DKIM signatures and shows the result in the e-mail header. This way it is possible to see which domain is claiming responsibility for a specific e-mail. How the result is shown can be changed in the options.

It is important to note that an e-mail can be signed by an arbitrary domains. A valid DKIM signature alone is therefore not an indicator for a trustworthy e-mail. Always check who the signer is to determine if an e-mail is trustworthy!

In some cases, the absence of a DKIM signature can be useful to identify scam e-mails. If it is known that a certain domain is signing all its e-mails with DKIM, the absence of a DKIM signature is a strong indicator for a forged e-mail.

To ease the checking of if and by who an e-mail is signed, the add-on supports the use of sign rules. With sign rules it is possible to specify that e-mails from a certain sender have to be always signed by a specific domain (also referred to as SDID). More about sign rules at https://github.com/lieser/dkim_verifier/wiki/Sign-rules.

A description of all the available add-on options can be found at https://github.com/lieser/dkim_verifier/wiki/Options.

screenshots.caption: The result of the verification is shown in the e-mail header.
If the DKIM signature has some minor issues, but is otherwise correct, a warning icon is shown in the DKIM header. This warning icon has a tooltip with additional information.
How the result of the verification should be shown can be changed in the options. More screenshots of the different Display options at https://github.com/lieser/dkim_verifier/wiki/Display-Options.

addons.description: This replaces the new monochrome icons with the old colorful icons. Based on Phoenity Icons (I only changed some of the icons).

addons.name: Darko
addons.description:
Simple dark mode (theme) for your Thunderbird messages.

FastAddons.com/#darko
addons.fullDescription:
NOTE: Version 3.0 update requires new permission "messageRead"!
Why?
In the new version 3.0 you can now exclude specific senders from applying dark mode. For example Steam sends already dark emails. To read sender email, I had to add new "messageRead" permission.

Darko will make your Thunderbird messages dark.
Version 3.0 adds "Excluded senders" feature, to automatically disable Darko for specific senders!
Dark mode can be also scheduled!

Motivation:
Thunderbird 78 has amazing dark mode that works even in the compose window. But it doesn't work in the message window (email body).
It turns out, it's not that easy to make email dark. There is often a lot of graphics and custom colors and it's hard to make it dark, yet still readable.

Solution?
Even though it's not possible to create perfect solution, it is possible to "invert" colors and shift "hue" so that it looks good enough.
And that's what I do here and the results are... well, you tell me :)


Support independent developer and official "Friend of add-ons" at Mozilla:

    I'm full-time add-on developer and your donation is my only income. There are no ads in my add-ons!
    Please support my work by:
        Buy me a coffee
        PayPal donation
        Be my Patron

    Thank you! :)
    Your donation will help me keep this add-on working in future versions of Thunderbird!



Privacy and permissions:

    permission "Read and modify your email messages as they are displayed to you" is used to inject dark CSS style to the email body
    permission "Read your email messages and mark or tag them" added in version 3.0 allows reading senders email (used by new "Excluded senders" feature)
    there are no other permissions so addon CANNOT send or receive any data



Recently added features:

    The list of changes in last versions is available here



Tags: black, color, dark, day, deepdark, dunkler, evening, firefox57, light, mode, negro, night, sun, schedule, schwarz, theme, time, tmavy, vision, темный, черный, 暗模式

screenshots.caption: Scheduler for automatic dark mode at night!

addons.name: Message Header Toolbar Customize
addons.description: You can change icon display and button order. You can also hide unnecessary buttons.
addons.fullDescription:
Thunderbird 78 removes customize functionality of message header view toolbar. This add-on reproduces the feature on Thunderbird 78.

You can do the followings:
* Change icon display: Icons beside text, Icons only or Text only
* Change order of toolbar buttons
* Hide unnecessary buttons
* Add spacer and separator
* Add Conversation, Tag and Forward As buttons, which removed from Thunderbird 78

For details, refer to my blog post.
https://hogiblog.blogspot.com/2020/09/customize-message-header-toolbar-of.html

From v2.1.0 the following features are added:
* Customize icon display individually (Choose "Individual" for the "Show" selector)
* Customize Quick Filter toolbar (right-click on the toolbar and choose Customize Toolbar)
* Rename toolbar buttons
* Hide Calendar and Today pane buttons
* Star and Print buttons are added to the message header toolbar (hidden by default)

See the following post for details of v2.1.0 features:
https://hogiblog.blogspot.com/2020/10/new-functionalities-of-message-header.html

screenshots.caption: Icon only display, hide junk button and move more menu to the end
Customize  the toolbar from right-click menu on the toolbar
Space and separator can be added to the toolbar
Conversation, Tag and Forward As buttons are back to your toolbar
Make icon only and hide archive button for the multi-messages header
Customize for each button. Plus, Forward button is rename to Fwd.
Customize Quick Filter toolbar (icon only display)
